description_long: This object is a medium-sized potted plant featuring a dense cluster of dark green, broad leaves that fill the upper portion of a simple, straight-sided pot. Rising above the foliage are several tall, slender stems, each topped with small, bright red berry-like clusters, adding a striking vertical accent to the arrangement. The pot itself is plain, with a matte, dark finish and a slightly tapered shape, likely made of plastic. The plant appears healthy and well-maintained, with no visible damage or discoloration on the leaves or stems. The overall design is modern and minimalistic, making it suitable for both indoor and outdoor urban environments. There are no visible decorative patterns or plant identification tags attached to the pot.
description: A modern potted plant with dense dark green foliage and tall stems bearing bright red berries, set in a plain, matte dark pot. The arrangement is visually striking and well-suited for urban spaces.
description_view_0: Front view shows the dense foliage and three prominent red-berried stems rising above the pot.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the asymmetrical spread of the stems and the fullness of the leaves on the left.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the foliage with two main berry stems visible, and a slightly more compact leaf arrangement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view reveals the tallest stem and a more rounded leaf profile, with the red berries clearly visible.
attribute_plant_species: ornamental berry plant (possibly Nandina domestica or similar)
